question: How do I register my company on the E-market place?
answer: To access the e-market place visit the https://nogicjqs.gov.ng to register your company. Same login is used to access the e-market place.

question: Is there any registration fee required for e-market place?
answer: No, you have to register as a company on the nogicjqs.gov.ng

question: How do I reset my password?
answer: Send a mail to support@nogicjqs.org or Login into the nogicjqs portal and change your password.

question: How do I get service code for advert opportunities on the E-market place?
answer: Select your preferred advert then click on bid, a screen will pop-up for remita payment online. Follow the step-by-step guide to pay for your service code on the e-market place platform.

question: How can I create products for my company on the E-market place?
answer: Login into your e-market place account, select product module from your menu then click on add product to fill the product form, submit to NCDMB.

question: How can I create services for my company on the E-market place?
answer: Login into your e-market place account, select service module from your menu then click on add services to fill the product form, submit to NCDMB.
